subject: Enable underscore in headers in nginx config
commit_message:
Enable underscore in headers in nginx config

Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>
Issue-ID: PORTAL-806
Change-Id: I9bd2cc1f01a13d198d705affe3cc56be96dd5ce0
